questionHtml: Deduce whether jellyfish or crustacea are a richer source of carbon in a food chain.
markschemeHtml:
crustacean as they have more carbon per unit volume
OR
crustacean as jellyfish has little carbon per total body size ✔

OWTTE.

The conclusion must be supported from the information given.

meta.title: Deduce whether jellyfish or crustacea are a richer source of carbon in a food chain.
